messages.content: Always use code blocks with the appropriate language tags. If asked for a table always format it using Markdown syntax.

Sure! Here are some popular emoji characters:

1. 😀 - Grinning Face
2. 😂 - Face With Tears of Joy
3. 🥰 - Smiling Face With Hearts
4. 😍 - Smiling Face With Heart-Eyes
5. 😊 - Smiling Face With Smiling Eyes
6. 😎 - Smiling Face With Sunglasses
7. 🤔 - Thinking Face
8. 👍 - Thumbs Up
9. 👏 - Clapping Hands
10. 😴 - Sleeping Face

Please note that the appearance of emojis may vary depending on the platform or device you are using.
